title: Preparation for Post-Quantum Cryptography (NZISM Section 2.4)
summary: Section 2.4 of the New Zealand Information Security Manual advises government agencies to inventory their cryptographically protected assets and begin planning migration to post-quantum cryptographic standards, referencing NIST PQC work. PDF identifies the manual as version 3.9, November 2025.

title: January 2022 New Zealand Information Security Manual v3.5 Release
summary: NCSC news item announcing NZISM version 3.5, which added a new section advising agencies to start planning for migration to post-quantum cryptographic standards. URL returned a 404 on verification (site appears restructured), so flagged for human review.
